# any

**Type Property**

Searches should return only the first contact found regardless of its position relative to the search parameters.

## Declaration

```swift
static let any: SCNPhysicsWorld.TestSearchMode
```

## Type Properties

- **all**: Searches should return all contacts matching the search parameters.
- **closest**: Searches should return only the closest contact to the beginning of the search.
